insight_events.title: Operating income accelerating
insight_events.summary: Operating income growth moved from +102.9% to +103.5% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Growth regime upshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to +66.5% to +103.5% YoY (baseline median +13.5% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

Leadership / governance on watch. Analog Devices (ADI) CEO sells 10K shares after exercising options under 10b5-1 plan - Stock Titan
Operating income growth moved from +102.9% to +103.5% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

risk_claims.claim: ROCHE VINCENT reported an insider sale of 60,000 shares ($24,358,406).

*Primary risk: A simultaneous industrial inventory correction and communications end-market softness could compress free cash flow per share faster than buybacks offset per-share economics, while $8.6 billion of debt limits balance-sheet flexibility.
Cyclical end markets: FY2023-to-FY2024 revenue fell 23% from peak; FY2025 recovery may stall if industrial customers destock again (`10-K_20251125` end-market tables).
